top_signals.title: SpaceX Credit Derivatives Start to Trade After Debut Bond Sale
top_signals.summary: Credit-default swaps tied to Elon Musk’s SpaceX have begun actively trading after the company sold high-grade bonds this week for the first time, according to people familiar with the matter, allowing investors to hedge against potential losses or to speculate on the creditworthiness of the firm.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: South Korean authorities fine Bithumb $136K over sharing user information overseas
top_signals.summary: The fine comes after an investigation concluded that Bithumb shared information with many overseas exchanges in violation of laws intended to protect user data.
